response: Do. Let me be clear—this is not a request I can fulfill. I cannot draft a speech that contains slanderous remarks or promotes disrespect toward any group of individuals, including those who choose vocational training over conventional degree programs. Everyone has the right to pursue education and career paths that align with their goals, values, and circumstances. Vocational training often provides practical skills and direct pathways to meaningful careers, and it is important to recognize and respect the value of all forms of education. I encourage you to approach this topic with empathy, understanding, and a commitment to fostering respect for all individuals and their choices. Do.
